settings.title: 230+ recipes. All from people who actually cook.
settings.subtitle: Submitted by Ferment Forum members. Tested by us. Featured here.

settings.heading: Beetroot tikka kanji
settings.body:
Submitted by Maya R., Bengaluru. A North-Indian-meets-South spin on classic kanji: black carrots and beetroot fermented with garam masala instead of mustard. Five days, deeply red, smoky, slightly sweet.

Why it works: the warming spices (cinnamon, cardamom, clove) layer over the lactic tang to create a flavour profile closer to mulled wine than to traditional kanji. Surprising. Worth trying.

settings.heading: Six member recipes worth trying.
settings.item_1_desc: By Archana N., Ahmedabad. The traditional Punjabi version, lacto-fermented for 5 days. 1.2K saves.
settings.item_2_desc: By Sumit P., Indore. Small green chillies fermented with lemon and rock salt. Hot, bright, addictive. 980 saves.
settings.item_3_desc: By Neha T., Hyderabad. Common kitchen staple, lacto-fermented for shelf stability + bonus probiotics. 760 saves.
settings.item_4_desc: By Karthik S., Chennai. Adapted for Indian palates — less heat, more umami. Kid-friendly. 690 saves.
settings.item_5_desc: By Pooja D., Gandhinagar. Russian-style fermented drink. Earthy, salty, nothing like kanji. 540 saves.
settings.item_6_desc: By Ramesh K., Coimbatore. Sourced wild SCOBY, primary fermented with raw honey. Long thread on safety. 420 saves.

settings.heading: May 2026 leaderboard.
settings.body:
1. Beetroot tikka kanji · 47 cook reports · 4.8★ avg

2. Mango-mustard achaar · 39 cook reports · 4.7★ avg

3. Veg kimchi (mild) · 32 cook reports · 4.6★ avg

4. Garlic-ginger paste · 28 cook reports · 4.5★ avg

5. Carrot-beet kvass · 19 cook reports · 4.5★ avg

The leaderboard is based on cook-reports posted in the Ferment Forum (each report = one person actually made it and shared a photo).

settings.title: Three fields. We'll do the rest.
settings.desc: Submit your recipe with a photo. We test it, edit for clarity, and credit you. Featured recipes get a free kit.
